en_title: Naughty Dog No-Show at PlayStation State of Play Leaves Fans Fearing Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet is Still a Long Way From Launch
cn_title: 《PlayStation》顽皮狗缺席State of Play，玩家担忧《星际：异端先知》遥遥无期
subtitle: 再见了，老朋友
opus_summary: 索尼最新State of Play发布会落幕，顽皮狗、Bend Studio、Media Molecule等多家第一方工作室未带来任何新消息。顽皮狗自2020年《最后生还者2》后未推出新作，其科幻新作《星际：异端先知》于2024年TGA公布，但至今无发售窗口。玩家担忧该作仍处于早期开发阶段，距离上市尚需时日。此外，Haven Studios的首款游戏《Fairgame$》也未亮相，而Guerrilla的《地平线 猎人集结》正在测试却未在发布会上展示。索尼第一方游戏销量近五年持续下滑，部分原因在于多款服务型游戏失败及项目取消。

paragraphs.en: Sony's big PlayStation State of Play broadcast has come and gone without any update on Naughty Dog's Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet — or word from several other first-party studios that haven't shipped a game in years.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼大型PlayStation State of Play发布会已经结束，但顽皮狗的《星际：异端先知》以及多家多年未推出新作的第一方工作室均未带来任何更新消息。

paragraphs.en: Last night's showcase provided our best look yet at Marvel's Wolverine from Insomniac Games , as well as a big reveal for God of War Laufey from Sony Santa Monica . We also saw the long-rumoured Until Dawn 2 pop up, from UK studio Firesprite. But other games that fans had been anticipating failed to materialize.
paragraphs.cn: 昨晚的展示让我们首次好好看到了Insomniac Games的《漫威金刚狼》，以及索尼圣莫尼卡的《战神：劳菲》的重大公布。我们还看到了传闻已久的《直到黎明2》亮相，由英国工作室Firesprite开发。但玩家期待的其他游戏并未出现。

paragraphs.en: The lack of any update from The Last of Us developer Naughty Dog was the showcase's most glaring omission. Naughty Dog last released a brand new game in the shape of The Last of Us Part 2, back in June 2020. The years since have seen it abandon a Last of Us multiplayer spinoff and begin work on its new sci-fi franchise Intergalactic — though there's still no word when this will arrive.
paragraphs.cn: 《最后生还者》开发商顽皮狗没有任何更新，是本次展示最明显的缺失。顽皮狗上一次推出全新游戏还是2020年6月的《最后生还者2》。此后几年里，他们放弃了一款《最后生还者》多人游戏衍生作品，转而开始开发新的科幻系列《星际：异端先知》——但该作何时发售仍无消息。

paragraphs.en: A sci-fi action adventure starring a bounty hunter with a cool plasma sword, Intergalactic began early development in 2020 and was revealed at The Game Awards in 2024. Naughty Dog creative director Neil Druckmann previously described the project as the studio's most expansive and ambitious game, and also likely its most expensive.
paragraphs.cn: 《星际：异端先知》是一款科幻动作冒险游戏，主角是一名赏金猎人，手持酷炫等离子剑。该作于2020年启动早期开发，2024年在TGA上公布。顽皮狗创意总监Neil Druckmann此前曾形容该项目是工作室规模最大、最具野心的游戏，可能也是成本最高的一款。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation fans had also been expecting to see more of Fairgame$, the debut title from Montreal-based Haven Studios. Founded in 2021 and acquired by Sony in 2022, the company is yet to ship a game.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation玩家原本还期待看到更多关于《Fairgame$》的消息，这是蒙特利尔工作室Haven Studios的首款作品。该公司成立于2021年，2022年被索尼收购，至今尚未推出任何游戏。

paragraphs.en: Bend Studio's most recent project remains Days Gone, launched in 2019. Media Molecule's most recent project was Dreams, released in 2020. Polyphony shipped Gran Turismo 7 in 2022, with no word on a new project either.
paragraphs.cn: Bend Studio的最新项目仍是2019年推出的《往日不再》。Media Molecule的最新项目是2020年发布的《梦想大创造》。Polyphony在2022年推出了《跑车浪漫旅7》，同样没有新项目的消息。

paragraphs.en: It was also something of a surprise that State of Play did not feature Horizon Hunters Gathering, Guerrilla’s new co-op action game spinoff set in the Horizon universe, which is going through betas right now.
paragraphs.cn: 同样令人意外的是，State of Play并未展示Guerrilla的新作《地平线 猎人集结》，这是一款设定在《地平线》宇宙的合作动作游戏衍生作品，目前正在进行测试。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this week, newly-analysed sales data laid bare the fact that PlayStation's first-party game sales have been declining over the past five years , though last year's Ghost of Yotei helped Sony buck that trend.
paragraphs.cn: 本周早些时候，最新分析的销售数据揭示了一个事实：PlayStation第一方游戏销量在过去五年中持续下滑，不过去年的《羊蹄山之魂》帮助索尼扭转了这一趋势。

paragraphs.en: There are various reasons for this, such as the failure of various live-service games and the cancellation of other in-development projects before release. In general, though, Sony is simply releasing fewer games.
paragraphs.cn: 造成这一现象的原因有多种，例如多款服务型游戏的失败，以及其他开发中项目在发售前被取消。但总体而言，索尼只是推出的游戏变少了。

paragraphs.en: For more on what we did see, be sure to read our interview with God of War Laufey's Ariel Lawrence and Cory Barlog and our chat with Insomniac Games on making Marvel's Wolverine an "unapologetically violent" adventure . We also have word on whether Spider-Man will pop up alongside Logan and an option to dial back the game's gore , if you so choose.
paragraphs.cn: 想了解更多关于我们看到的游戏，请务必阅读我们对《战神：劳菲》的Ariel Lawrence和Cory Barlog的采访，以及我们与Insomniac Games关于将《漫威金刚狼》打造成「毫不掩饰的暴力」冒险的对话。我们还了解到蜘蛛侠是否会与金刚狼一同出现，以及如果你愿意，可以选择降低游戏的血腥程度。

paragraphs.en: For all the other announcements, check out our roundup of everything from the June 2026 State of Play .
paragraphs.cn: 至于其他所有公告，请查看我们对2026年6月State of Play所有内容的汇总。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。

manual_approved_issues.detail: translation still contains raw currency symbol/code; convert it to Chinese currency text plus CNY
